references.title: Hermès W041168WW00 Slim Quantième Perpétuel
references.text: Ultra-thin perpetual calendar at 12.2mm total thickness, showcasing Hermès' advancement in haute horlogerie complications.

references.title: Hermès GM 1.740 Arceau Original
references.text: First Hermès watch designed by Henri d'Origny, establishing the asymmetric lug design that defines the brand's watchmaking identity.

references.title: Hermès AR7.710 Arceau Le Temps Suspendu
references.text: First Hermès-exclusive complication allowing time suspension designed by Jean-Marc Wiederrecht.

references.title: Hermès W046434WW00 Arceau Awooooga Limited Edition
references.text: Limited to 24 pieces with car horn minute repeater complication, unique automotive-inspired chiming mechanism.

references.title: Hermès W050072WW00 Arceau L'Heure de la Lune
references.text: Dual moonphase display for Northern and Southern hemispheres with innovative counter-rotating discs.

references.title: Hermès W044181WW00 Arceau Lift Tourbillon Répétition Minutes
references.text: Limited to 3 pieces with flying tourbillon and minute repeater, showcasing early high complication partnerships.

references.title: Hermès W051042WW00 Arceau Skeleton Japan Limited Edition
references.text: Japanese market exclusive with skeleton movement and limited to 30 pieces.

references.title: Hermès CL4.710 Clipper Original
references.text: First Clipper model with porthole-inspired case design, becoming one of Hermès' most commercially successful watch lines.

references.title: Hermès ET1.710 Etrier Jump Hour
references.text: Early digital jump-hour display watch featuring Hermès' stirrup-inspired case shape.

references.title: Hermès CA1.710 Cape Cod Original
references.text: Iconic double-tour strap watch with chain-link anchor motif, defining Hermès' leather-focused watch design philosophy.

references.title: Hermès W036785WW00 Cape Cod GMT
references.text: First GMT complication in the Cape Cod collection with distinctive rectangular case.

references.title: Hermès DR6.710 Dressage L'Heure Masquée
references.text: Hidden-hour complication with rotating disc, first major haute horlogerie complication from La Montre Hermès.

references.title: Hermès W044182WW00 Dressage Chronograph Manufacture
references.text: First manufacture chronograph movement for Hermès developed with Vaucher partnership.

references.title: Hermès HH1.710 Harnais Original
references.text: Harness-inspired case design with distinctive stirrup lugs, discontinued collection exemplifying equestrian heritage.

references.title: Hermès NO1.710 Nantucket Original Tonneau
references.text: Rectangular tonneau case inspired by ship anchor shape, discontinued collection with strong nautical identity.
